findings.title: Hardcoded Secret Keys in test.env
findings.description: Sensitive configuration contains hardcoded secret keys that could be used by attackers
findings.impact: Authentication bypass, session hijacking, unauthorized access to protected resources
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets, use environment variable placeholders, implement proper secret management

findings.title: Debug Mode Enabled in Test Configuration
findings.description: Debug mode is enabled which can expose sensitive information in production
findings.impact: Information disclosure, stack trace exposure, development information leakage
findings.recommendation: Set DEBUG=false for production, implement environment-specific configuration

findings.title: Potential Command Injection Vectors
findings.description: Multiple Python files contain subprocess, exec, or eval usage that could be vulnerable to injection
findings.location: Multiple files: crew_orchestrator.py, data_tools.py, agent_tools.py, etc.
findings.impact: Remote code execution, system compromise, data exfiltration
findings.recommendation: Review all subprocess calls for proper input sanitization, avoid exec/eval if possible

findings.title: MCP Tool Input Validation Gaps
findings.description: MCP tools may not properly validate input before processing user requests
findings.evidence: JSON parsing without validation in search_players_by_criteria and other tools
findings.impact: JSON injection, denial of service, malformed data processing
findings.recommendation: Implement strict input validation for all MCP tool parameters

findings.title: Outdated Dependencies with Potential Vulnerabilities
findings.description: Requirements.txt contains numerous dependencies that may have security vulnerabilities
findings.impact: Known CVE exploitation, supply chain attacks, dependency confusion
findings.recommendation: Run pip-audit to identify specific vulnerabilities, update packages regularly

findings.title: Unsafe JSON Parsing
findings.description: JSON.loads() usage without error handling could lead to exceptions or processing of malicious JSON
findings.impact: Denial of service, application crashes, potential memory exhaustion
findings.recommendation: Implement try-catch blocks and JSON schema validation

findings.title: API Key Environment Variable Dependencies
findings.description: Code expects OPENAI_API_KEY but doesn't validate or secure the handling
findings.impact: API key exposure, unauthorized API usage, cost implications
findings.recommendation: Implement secure API key storage and validation mechanisms

findings.title: Docker Configuration Security Issues
findings.description: Docker configuration may not follow security best practices
findings.evidence: Files present but require detailed analysis
findings.impact: Container escape, privilege escalation, insecure defaults
findings.recommendation: Review Docker configuration against CIS benchmarks, implement least privilege

findings.title: Default Database Configuration
findings.description: Using default SQLite database configuration which may not be suitable for production
findings.impact: Data persistence issues, performance limitations, concurrent access problems
findings.recommendation: Configure proper production database with authentication and encryption

findings.title: Missing Input Validation in Betting Logic
findings.description: Betting configuration parameters may not have proper validation
findings.impact: Financial logic bypass, unexpected behavior, business logic flaws
findings.recommendation: Implement validation for financial parameters and business rules

immediate_actions: Remove hardcoded secrets from test.env file
Run pip-audit to identify vulnerable dependencies
strategic_improvements: Set up automated security scanning in CI/CD
Conduct code review focused on subprocess/exec usage
Add security testing to development workflow

validation_required: Manual code review of subprocess usage
